name: societyer-document-intake
description: AI guidance for transposing source documents into Societyer import sessions and supported app sections.

interface.shortDescription: Transpose documents into Societyer review records.
interface.longDescription: Guides an AI through Societyer's document intake surface: supported import bundle shapes, page-by-page fields, privacy gates, and review-first transposition into Convex-backed modules.
defaultPrompt: Map these documents to Societyer import records.
Tell me which fields this document can transpose.
